name: Cryptomining Pool Network Connection
description: Detects network connections to known cryptocurrency mining pools
query:
// Detect connections to mining pool domains
// Trigger on DNS queries or proxy requests to mining pools
events from dns
where query_name matches "(?i)(pool\.minexmr|nanopool\.org|2miners\.com|f2pool\.com|ethermine\.org|nicehash\.com|minergate\.com|unmineable\.com|hashvault\.pro)"
group by source_ip
having count(*) > 0
within 300 seconds
